title: miguelia somae
intro: Miguelia somae, also known as Mexican tea or hierba de la reina, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Miguelia somae include reducing fever, relieving cold and flu symptoms, and treating digestive issues, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine. Miguelia somae can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be made into a tincture or syrup for easier consumption.
